title: geranium libanoticum
intro: Geranium libanoticum, also known as the Lebanese geranium, is a perennial plant native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Geranium libanoticum include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of menopause. The herbal preparations of Geranium libanoticum include essential oils, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
